0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h1","children":"Quick Start"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Get Mnemosyne v3.4.1 running in under 5 minutes. This guide covers installation, basic configuration, and your first memory operations — including entity extraction and temporal recall."}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Prerequisites"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Python 3.10 or higher"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"pip or uv package manager"}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Install"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Install Mnemosyne ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"with semantic search"}],":"]}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"# Recommended: pipx (isolated, survives env rebuilds)\npipx install mnemosyne-memory[embeddings]\n\n# Or traditional pip\npip install mnemosyne-memory[embeddings]\n\n# Using uv (faster)\nuv pip install mnemosyne-memory[embeddings]\n\n# Upgrade\npip install --upgrade mnemosyne-memory[embeddings]\n# or: pipx upgrade mnemosyne-memory[embeddings]\n","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-info","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L4",null,{"iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 16v-4","key":"1dtifu"}],["path",{"d":"M12 8h.01","key":"e9boi3"}]],"className":"lucide-info shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"What [embeddings] gives you"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":[["$","p",null,{"children":["The ",["$","code",null,{"children":"[embeddings]"}]," extra installs ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"fastembed"}],", which powers semantic vector search. With it, Mnemosyne can:"]}],["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Match memories by ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"meaning"}],", not just keywords"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Find \"Italian food\" when you search \"pizza\" (semantic similarity)"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Combine vector + text scores for ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"hybrid retrieval"}]]}],"\n"]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["Without ",["$","code",null,{"children":"[embeddings]"}],", you get FTS5 keyword search only."]}]]}]]}]]}]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Your First Memories"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\n\nmem = Mnemosyne()\n\n# Store a memory with entity extraction\nmem.remember(\n  \"Alice prefers dark mode for the UI. She's the project lead.\",\n  extract_entities=True,\n  importance=0.8,\n)\n\n# Store with LLM fact extraction\nmem.remember(\n  \"The deadline was moved to June 15th.\",\n  extract=True,\n)\n\n# Temporal recall — find what happened recently\nresults = mem.recall(\"UI preferences\", top_k=5)\n\nfor r in results:\n  print(f\"[{r['score']:.3f}] {r['content']}\")\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Configurable Retrieval"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne v3 lets you tune scoring weights per query:"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"# Boost text matching over semantic similarity\nresults = mem.recall(\n  \"exact error code E501\",\n  vec_weight=20.0,\n  fts_weight=60.0,\n  importance_weight=20.0,\n)\n\n# Emphasize very recent memories\nresults = mem.recall(\n  \"what did we discuss today?\",\n  temporal_weight=0.6,\n  temporal_halflife=24.0,  # 24-hour half-life\n)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Memory Banks"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Isolate memories for different projects or contexts:"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"# Create a bank for work projects\nwork_mem = Mnemosyne(bank=\"work\")\nwork_mem.remember(\"Deployed v3.4.0 to staging.\")\n\n# Separate bank for personal\npersonal_mem = Mnemosyne(bank=\"personal\")\npersonal_mem.remember(\"Dentist appointment on Friday.\")\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Optional: sqlite-vec for Performance"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"sqlite-vec"}]," is an ","$L5"," for large datasets (100K+ memories). It moves vector similarity search into native C code inside SQLite. Without it, Mnemosyne uses an in-memory numpy fallback that works fine for most use cases."]}],"\n","$L6","\n","$L7","\n","$L8","\n","$L9","\n","$La","\n","$Lb"],["$Lc"],"$Ld"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"rtJ0eqHCh63syYxNV3Zvo"}
5:["$","strong",null,{"children":"optional performance boost"}]
6:["$","$L3",null,{"code":"pip install sqlite-vec","language":"bash"}]
7:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Verify Installation"}]
8:["$","p",null,{"children":"Confirm everything is working:"}]
9:["$","$L3",null,{"code":"python -c \"import mnemosyne; print(mnemosyne.__version__)\"\n# Should print: 2.8.0\n","language":"bash"}]
a:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"What's Next?"}]
b:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Read the ",["$","a",null,{"href":"https://docs.mnemosyne.site/getting-started/installation","children":"Installation Guide"}]," for detailed setup options"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Explore the ",["$","a",null,{"href":"https://docs.mnemosyne.site/api/python-sdk","children":"Python SDK Reference"}]," for the full API"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Learn about the ",["$","a",null,{"href":"https://docs.mnemosyne.site/architecture/beam-overview","children":"BEAM Architecture"}]," to understand how memory works"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["See ",["$","a",null,{"href":"https://docs.mnemosyne.site/retrieval/hybrid-search","children":"Hybrid Search"}]," for retrieval tuning details"]}],"\n"]}]
